sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ الرُّكْنُ الثَّانِي مِنْ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ الْخَمْسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz je drugi stub od pet islamskih šartova.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the second pillar of the five pillars of Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «بُنِيَ الْإِسْلَامُ عَلَى خَمْسٍ»، وَذَكَرَ مِنْهَا إِقَامَ الصَّلَاةِ [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْإِيمَانِ، رَقْمُ ٨].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: 'Islam je sagrađen na pet stvari', a spomenuo je i obavljanje namaza [Bilježi el-Buhari u Knjizi o imanu, broj 8].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Islam is built on five,' and he mentioned establishing prayer [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Faith, No. 8].

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُحَافِظَ عَلَى صَلَاتِهِ فِي وَقْتِهَا الْمُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman mora čuvati svoj namaz u njegovom određenom vremenu.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must maintain their prayer at its specified time.

sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ تَمْحُو الذُّنُوبَ الصَّغِيرَةَ وَتُطَهِّرُ قَلْبَ الْمُؤْمِنِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz briše male grijehe i čisti srce vjernika.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer erases minor sins and purifies the believer's heart.

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ يَشْعُرُ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالسَّكِينَةِ عِنْدَمَا يَقِفُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَبِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman osjeća odmor i smiraj kada stoji pred svojim Gospodarom.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim feels comfort and tranquility when standing before their Lord.
